title: Ottawa, Ontario — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ottawa, Ontario: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ottawa is a city in Ontario with a population of 1,017,449. Canada’s capital offers stable government employment, beautiful waterways, and a family-friendly environment with moderate costs.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
